label: Modality
description: The modality of the dataset, such as text, image, audio, or video.

label: Task Category
description: The category of the machine learning task associated with the dataset.

label: Task Name
description: The specific task ID associated with the dataset.

label: License
description: The license under which the dataset is distributed.

label: Format
description: The format of the dataset, such as CSV, JSON, etc.

label: Language
description: The language of the dataset content.

label: Size
description: The size of the dataset in rows.

label: Issued Date
description: The date when the dataset was issued.

label: Modified Date
description: The date when the dataset was last modified.

label: Download Count
description: The number of times the dataset has been downloaded.

label: Likes Count
description: The number of likes the dataset has received.
